title: kernel/voteの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: **Audit Verdict** Conditionally production-ready. I did not find a deterministic runtime break in the current tree at `ab8deb8`, but there are **operational blockers under common misconfiguration** and a few residual risks. **Findings (severity order)** - High (Operational blocker): baseline trio gate defaults to required, so missing Claude/GLM credentials can hard-stop execution. - Baseline trio is enabled by default: [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L49), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1185) - If any of `codex/claude/glm` baseline successes is zero, gate fails: [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L204), [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L214), [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh#L248) - GLM lane explicitly skips when `ZAI_API_KEY` is absent: [subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh#L603) - Claude lane can skip when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is absent and proxy path disabled: [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L725), [ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh#L260) - Medium (Operational blocker in strict mode): if subscription offline policy is `hold` and no online self-hosted runner exists, orchestration is skipped. - Skip condition: [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L853), [resolve-orchestration-context.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/harness/resolve-orchestration-context.sh#L855) - Medium (Residual risk): main-model default is still inconsistent inside `fugue-tutti-router`. - Run-agents path defaults main to `gpt-5-codex`: [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L524) - Resolve/matrix path still defaults main to `gpt-5.4`: [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1360), [fugue-tutti-router.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-router.yml#L1734) - This can produce path-dependent model selection/cost/perf behavior. - Medium (Residual risk): CI gate does not enforce `/vote` runtime smoke by default. - CI runs static vote prompt test: [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml#L125) - Runtime smoke is conditional on env flag: [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L146) **Validation evidence** - Passed: `tests/test-codex-live-defaults.sh`, `tests/test-build-agent-matrix-defaults.sh`, `tests/test-kernel-diversity-contract.sh`, `tests/test-resolve-orchestration-context.sh`, `tests/test-model-policy.sh`, `tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh` - Passed: `scripts/check-agent-matrix-parity.sh`, `scripts/check-linked-systems-integrity.sh`, `scripts/sim-orchestrator-switch.sh` (`rows=20`) No edits were made.
